source.title: The role of ctDNA in precision adjuvant therapy for colorectal cancer: a scoping review.

finding.description: In stage II colon cancer, ctDNA-guided management reduced chemotherapy use without compromising recurrence-free survival.
finding.effect_summary: ctDNA-guided management reduced chemotherapy use without compromising recurrence-free survival in stage II colon cancer.

source_quote: In stage II colon cancer, ctDNA-guided management reduced chemotherapy use without compromising recurrence-free survival.

source.title: The role of ctDNA in precision adjuvant therapy for colorectal cancer: a scoping review.

finding.description: Postoperative ctDNA positivity strongly predicts recurrence and often precedes radiologic relapse by ~3-10 months.
finding.effect_summary: Postoperative ctDNA positivity predicts recurrence and precedes radiologic relapse by 3-10 months.

source_quote: Postoperative ctDNA positivity strongly predicts recurrence and often precedes radiologic relapse by ~3-10 months.

source.title: The role of ctDNA in precision adjuvant therapy for colorectal cancer: a scoping review.

finding.description: ctDNA dynamics add prognostic resolution: clearance after adjuvant therapy is associated with excellent outcomes, whereas persistent positivity signals very high relapse risk.
finding.effect_summary: ctDNA clearance after adjuvant therapy indicates excellent outcomes; persistent positivity indicates high relapse risk.

source_quote: ctDNA dynamics add prognostic resolution: clearance after adjuvant therapy is associated with excellent outcomes, whereas persistent positivity signals very high relapse risk.
